titleStmt.title: SII 20.41: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 41. (B.K. No. 129 of 1935-36.) BANAVĀSI, SIRSI TALUK, NORTH KANARA DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab set up to the left of the Vīrabhadradēva shrine in the compound of the Madhukēśvara temple.

summary.p: This record is dated Śaka 990, Kīlaka, Chaitra, śu. 13, the other details being lost. It corresponds to A.D. 1068, March 19, when the week-day was Wednesday.

The first 17 lines of the record are published in Epigraphia Indica, Vol. XVI, pp. 353 ff. It refers to Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Kīrtivarmadēva governing Banavāsi 12,000. The subsequent portion, which is badly, damaged, seems to record a gift to Kalla-dēgula.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīpṛthivīvallabhamahārājādhirājaparamēśvaraṁ para
mabhaṭṭārakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatraiḷōkyamalladēvar
pṛthvīrājyaṁgeyye . svasti samastakuḷamahīdharacakracakrava
rtti(mahima)himavadgirīṁdraruṁdrasikharataḷasthāpitanijānvayasakti
prabhāvaprakaṭīkritakadaṁbakuḷāṁbarapracaṇḍamārttaṁḍaṁ paranripati
makuṭaghaṭṭitacaraṇāraviṁdayugaḷaṁ banavāsipuravarēśvaraṁ
sākhācarēṁdradhvajaṁ siṁhalāṁcanaṁ permaṭṭipaṟeghōṣaṇaṁ caturāsīti
nagarādhiṣṭhitaṁ lalāṭalōcanaṁ jagadviditāṣṭādasāśvamēdhadīkṣitaku
ḷaprasūtaṁ satyaratnākaraṁ majjādēvīlabdhavaraprasādaṁ sarasijā
mōdaṁ mārkkolabhairavaṁ samarajayaghaṁṭāravaṁ kādaṁbakaṇṭhīra
va(ṁ)maṇṇana baṁṭaṁ vairiniḥkaṁṭaṁ tailana siṁghaṁ sāhasōttuṁgaṁ
saraṇāgatavajrapanjaraṁ vairimadabhaṁjanaṁ birudagurvvanuṁ
jagadorvvagaṇḍaṁ kadanamārtaṁṇḍa(ṁ) marasaṁkarudraṁ malegaḷa kēsa
ri mūvaḍigaṇḍara jāju nāmādi samastaprasastisahi
taṁ śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ kīrttivarmadēvarvvanavāsi
pannircchāsiramanēkachatrachāyeyiṁdamāḷuttamire . sakavarṣa
990 neya kīlaka samvatsarada caitra śuddha trayōdaśi
ṣaṇa mahāprā
leya daṇḍanā
gga śrīmadaṇṇa
ṇya kāraṁ geydoḍaṁ .
yal koṭṭarātaṁ kalla dēgula dēvargge biṭṭadā dharmavaṁ kīrtti
galadēviyuṁ pratipāḷisidarī dharmavanāvanōrvvaṁ kādātaṁ
yoḷ sā koṭṭa phaḷamī dharmavanaḷidā
yoḷ sā ḷidadōśa . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ
vasuṁdha hasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jā
na viṣaṁ viṣa dēvaśvaṁ viṣamucyatē viṣa
haṁti dēvasvaṁ putraṁ . mi kalkuṭika mallōjaṁge
biṭṭa © .
Digital edition of SII 20.41 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
